pr.title: Int6 11L + SmearGate + BigramHash + SWA + OrthoInit + MuonWD (val_bpb 1.1555)

output.summary: Int6 per-row quantized 11-layer model uses SmearGate gating, BigramHash context, SWA warmdown, OrthoInit scaling, and NTK-aware RoPE with sliding-window eval.
techniques: - Int6 per-row quantization with SmearGate gating and BigramHash context embedding
- SWA warmdown plus Muon optimizer with WD and OrthoInit scaling
- NTK-aware RoPE trained for >16k context and sliding-window stride=64 eval
